name: 每日 AI 抖音短视频草稿

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $vars.OPENAI_RESPONSES_MODEL || 'gpt-4.1-mini', tools: [{ type: 'web_search' }], tool_choice: 'auto', include: ['web_search_call.action.sources'], input: '今天是北京时间 ' + $json.run_date + '。请联网搜索今天和最近72小时内的人工智能热点，生成5个适合抖音60秒短视频的中文选题。要求：1）事实必须附来源链接；2）不编造；3）不要出现微信、手机号、QQ群、邮箱等站外联系方式；4）不要自动发布；5）每个选题给出0-100分评分。只输出JSON，不要Markdown。JSON格式：{"topics":[{"topic":"","angle":"","target_audience":"","why_now":"","score":0,"risk_note":"","search_keywords":[""],"source_links":[{"title":"","url":"","publisher":"","published_at":""}]}]}' }) }}

nodes.name: OpenAI 搜索并生成5个选题

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $vars.OPENAI_RESPONSES_MODEL || 'gpt-4.1-mini', tools: [{ type: 'web_search' }], tool_choice: 'auto', include: ['web_search_call.action.sources'], input: '请基于这个已选抖音选题生成60秒短视频草稿，并再次联网核验关键事实。已选选题：' + JSON.stringify($json.selected_topic) + '。硬性规则：标题、字幕、口播、封面文案、评论区引导语都不能出现微信号、手机号、QQ、QQ群、邮箱、Telegram、WhatsApp、加我、进群、私信领资料等站外联系方式；不自动发布；事实必须保留来源链接；素材关键词必须适合在Pexels/Pixabay搜索授权视频。只输出JSON，不要Markdown。JSON格式：{"script_id":"","topic":"","voiceover":"约60秒中文口播","subtitle_text":"完整字幕文案","subtitle_blocks":[{"start":0,"end":6,"text":""}],"titles":["标题1","标题2","标题3"],"cover_text":"封面文案，不超过18字","comment_guide":"评论区引导语，只引导站内评论，不引导私信和外部联系","storyboard":[{"time":"0-5s","visual":""}],"material_keywords":["ai technology","robotics","data center"],"facts":[{"claim":"","source_url":"","source_title":""}],"risk_notes":[""]}' }) }}

nodes.name: OpenAI 生成脚本标题封面

parameters.url: ={{ 'https://api.creatomate.com/v2/renders/' + (($node['Creatomate 合成竖版视频'].json.id) || ($node['Creatomate 合成竖版视频'].json[0] && $node['Creatomate 合成竖版视频'].json[0].id) || '') }}

parameters.jsCode:
const result = $node['整理最终结果'].json;
const text = [
  '【每日AI抖音草稿待审核】',
  '日期：' + result.date,
  '选题：' + result.topic,
  '标题1：' + result.title_1,
  '视频状态：' + result.video_status,
  '审核状态：' + result.review_status,
  '视频链接：' + (result.video_url || 'Creatomate仍在渲染，请稍后查看Render ID：' + result.creatomate_render_id),
  '素材来源：' + result.material_platform + ' ' + result.material_page_url,
  '事实来源：\n' + result.source_links,
  '发布前请人工审核，不要自动发布抖音。'
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { ...result, notification_text: text } }];

main.node: OpenAI 搜索并生成5个选题
OpenAI 生成脚本标题封面
